category_sources: Official docbook2X homepage describes conversion from DocBook documents to Unix man page and GNU Texinfo formats.
source_facts.description: Convert DocBook to UNIX manpages and GNU TeXinfo.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project title use docbook2X capitalization.
docs_sources: Official docbook2X homepage links to online documentation for the latest release.
Official docbook2X online documentation directory for the latest release.
repo_sources: Official docbook2X homepage links to the CVS repository, and the official SourceForge project exposes it under /p/docbook2x/code/.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official SourceForge project Code page.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes the same conversion purpose.
source_facts.description identifies DocBook to manpage and Texinfo conversion.
